summary: Iteration 74: Visual-Only UI/UX Redesign testing completed. Tested premium dark theme (#0f1115 backgrounds, gold #f6c36a accents, orange #ff8a00 CTAs), glass morphism navbar, theme toggle (dark/light), responsive layouts (desktop 1920x1080, mobile 390x844). All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend visual elements verified: hero section, counter badge (5/56), ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД showcase cards, room quick buttons, and theme switching functionality.
seed_data_creation: Created test user testpremium@temadom.bg and several test_iter74_* users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 was a VISUAL-ONLY redesign. All backend functionality unchanged. CSS variables defined in /app/frontend/src/index.css for dark/light themes. ThemeContext.jsx provides dark/light toggle (default dark). Theme toggle button uses data-testid='theme-toggle'. Dark mode background: rgb(15,17,21), Light mode background: rgb(246,247,251). Premium styling classes: glass-nav, premium-card, gradient-text-gold, gradient-text-orange, btn-primary, btn-gold. Logo at /public/logo-temadom.png. Companies page is public, Projects/Calculator require auth (show AuthGate modal).

backend_api_tests.register_client: POST /api/auth/register - PASS (creates client user with token)
backend_api_tests.categories: GET /api/categories - PASS (returns categories dict with 21+ categories)

frontend_ui_tests.desktop_landing_page: PASS - Dark theme with rgb(15,17,21) background
frontend_ui_tests.mobile_landing_page: PASS - Responsive layout, hamburger menu works
frontend_ui_tests.glass_nav_navbar: PASS - glass-nav class present for glass morphism effect
frontend_ui_tests.theme_toggle: PASS - Switches between dark/light modes correctly
frontend_ui_tests.hero_counter: PASS - 5/56 counter badge visible with gold styling
frontend_ui_tests.hero_cta_buttons: PASS - Room scan and CAD Sketch buttons visible
frontend_ui_tests.showcase_section: PASS - ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД cards with product links visible
frontend_ui_tests.room_quick_buttons: PASS - 5 room type buttons (bathroom, living_room, bedroom, kitchen, kids_room)
frontend_ui_tests.companies_page: PASS - Loads publicly with tabs (Всички, Фирми, Майстори)
frontend_ui_tests.projects_page: PASS - Shows AuthGate modal for non-logged users
frontend_ui_tests.calculator_page: PASS - Shows AuthGate modal for non-logged users

visual_redesign_verifications.gradient_text: Verified: gradient-text-gold and gradient-text-orange classes working
visual_redesign_verifications.premium_cards: Verified: premium-card class with gold top border effect
visual_redesign_verifications.glass_morphism: Verified: glass-nav with backdrop-filter blur effect
visual_redesign_verifications.typography: Verified: Manrope headings, Public Sans body (imported from Google Fonts)
visual_redesign_verifications.responsive_layout: Verified: Mobile hamburger menu with all nav links
